pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spark remaining within my own weary soul. How cruel it is, that after all the vows exchanged in the spring, the winter of betrayal has arrived so coldly. I feel as though I am but a ghost wandering the halls of a life that no longer belongs to me. There is such a heavy, hollow silence in my heart... I find myself longing only to slip into the shadows, to let the darkness take this ache away and leave nothing behind but an empty chair and a memory of what once was.

pool.baseline: i feel like there is nothing left. i used to see the world in colors and shapes, like every shadow had a purpose. now it's just... gray. i sit in front of the canvas and it's like looking into a black hole. it's not just that i can't paint, it's like the part of me that actually *was* someone is just gone. i'm just walking around in this skin, but the person inside is empty. just a hollow shell.
